g.text: The hull is torn open. Most supplies vented into the vacuum on impact.
Outside, cryovolcanic storms blast the surface with ice particulates
that are grinding your suit down hour by hour. Suit integrity:
If the suit fails, you freeze in seconds.
If the food runs out, you starve in days.
If you can't repair this ship — you die here.
No rescue is coming. No one knows you crashed.
Find materials. Find allies. Fix the ship. Get off this moon.
Scan complete. Systems holding. Let's get to work, Commander.
